source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Warm English product UI with precise dashboard numerals and Japanese guidance tuned for approachable brand systems.
layout: Soft 8px grids, water-worn radius, compact dashboard cards, translucent banding texture, and restrained warm shadows.

prompts.label: Transparent carnelian pebble motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Carnelian transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a carnelian pebble motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as one complete subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A single polished river-gravel carnelian pebble, warm orange-red translucent chalcedony with cream cloudy bands, amber inner glow, rounded water-worn oval form, tiny mineral inclusions, subtle glossy stone highlights, natural river pebble realism. It should read clearly as carnelian, not candy, fruit, glass marble, or a cut gemstone.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; include the full pebble without cropping. Clean studio lighting, no cast shadow.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #00ff00 background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no jewelry setting, no hand, no river scene, no pile of stones, no facets, no text, no watermark, no labels, no other minerals dominating.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Carnelian light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Carnelian", derived from a polished river-gravel carnelian pebble motif. This board is a source reference for a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible warm brand UI theme.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, clean professional UI design-system presentation, target 3840x2160 composition.
Required visible sections: Morphous Carnelian, Carnelian Pebble, Palette, Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Extract colors and interaction language from translucent orange-red carnelian, amber inner glow, cream cloudy bands, water-worn rounded pebble edges, dark mineral inclusions, and river-gravel warmth. The board must read as carnelian river pebble, not citrus, candy, lava, or generic orange SaaS.
Palette names to display: Cream Veil #fff3df, Ironwood Ink #2d1711, Carnelian Red #b94a24, Amber Glow #ef8a2e, Milky Agate #f4c58f, River Silt #8a6556, Pebble Blush #f8dcc0, Inclusion Brown #5b3024, Sunlit Quartz #ffd17a.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Style: warm brand system, 8px radius with softened water-worn corners, cream surfaces, carnelian-red primary actions, amber chart accents, milky agate panels, ironwood text, subtle translucent banding texture, restrained shadows, practical product dashboard density.
Constraints: no fruit slices, no candy, no flames, no lava, no beach sunset, no generic orange gradients, no unrelated saturated colors, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Carnelian", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Carnelian dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Carnelian". It must feel like the light-mode board translated to dark mode and remain derived from a polished river-gravel carnelian pebble motif.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, clean professional UI design-system presentation, target 3840x2160 composition.
Required visible sections: Morphous Carnelian, Carnelian Pebble, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Preserve translucent orange-red carnelian active states, amber inner glow, cream agate highlights, river-silt muted surfaces, ironwood-dark backgrounds, rounded water-worn edges, and subtle mineral inclusions. Must read as carnelian river pebble, not citrus, candy, lava, or generic orange SaaS.
Palette names to display: Cream Veil #fff3df, Ironwood Ink #2d1711, Carnelian Red #b94a24, Amber Glow #ef8a2e, Milky Agate #f4c58f, River Silt #8a6556, Pebble Blush #f8dcc0, Inclusion Brown #5b3024, Sunlit Quartz #ffd17a.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Visual details: ironwood and inclusion-brown dark surfaces, cream foreground text, carnelian-red buttons, amber charts, milky agate chips, warm translucent banding texture, crisp low-contrast borders, practical dashboard density, 8px radius with softened water-worn corners.
Constraints: no fruit slices, no candy, no flames, no lava, no neon orange, no pure-black-only flat background, no generic orange gradients, no illegible tiny paragraphs, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Carnelian".
